name: mask
description: Distill anything. Wear anyone. — agent-native persona distillation framework.

scripts.build:all: bun build ./src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile ./bin/mask-macos-arm64 && bun build ./src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile ./bin/mask-linux-x64 && bun build ./src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile ./bin/mask-windows-x64.exe
